series_metadata.series_description: The contract change form allows individual changes to the contract to take place. (For example: If the owner dies he is replaced by the successor owner. A new successor owner would need to be appointed.) Confidential by Ohio Revised Code 3334.11.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Imaged files are kept permanently ; Paper: Retain 1 year on site, image, then store for 6 years, then destroy. Older records that have not been imaged will be retained for the life of the contract, Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
